name: garret-example-adb-devices
description: List + mirror Android devices via ya-webadb (host connects to the local adb server)
comment: scrcpy + adb-scrcpy pinned EXACT: the option class (AdbScrcpyOptions2_3) + SCRCPY_VERSION in host/adb/mirror.ts + the jar URL in build.mjs must move together. A caret float to 2.4+ would break at first mirror, not at install.
